prerequisites: An Opsgenie account with an Account Owner or Global Admin role, which is required to generate API keys under Settings.
An Opsgenie API key created in API Key Management with at least Read and Configuration Access permissions so the connector can read alerts, incidents, and configurations.

The correct regional API endpoint host for your Opsgenie instance (api.opsgenie.com for the standard/US instance, or api.eu.opsgenie.com for the EU instance) to provide in the required 'endpoint' field.

authMethods.name: API key (GenieKey)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the 'api_token' secret field, which holds an Opsgenie API key. Opsgenie's REST API authenticates each request with the GenieKey scheme, sending the key in the header as 'Authorization: GenieKey {api_token}'. Opsgenie also accepts HTTP Basic auth as 'Authorization: Basic base64(:{api_token})', but the GenieKey header is the standard method.

setupSteps.title: Generate an Opsgenie API key
setupSteps.body: In Opsgenie, go to Settings > App Settings > API Key Management and click Add New API Key. Name the key and grant it the access rights the connector needs (Read and Configuration Access are sufficient to read alerts, incidents, and configurations). Save the key. Only Account Owners and Global Admins can create API keys.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API token
setupSteps.body: Copy the generated API key and set it as the required, secret 'api_token' field. The connector sends this value in the 'Authorization: GenieKey {api_token}' header on every request.

setupSteps.title: Set the regional endpoint
setupSteps.body: Set the required 'endpoint' field to the API host for your Opsgenie instance: use api.opsgenie.com for the standard instance, or api.eu.opsgenie.com if your account is on the EU instance. Requests fail if the EU instance is configured against the non-EU host.

setupSteps.title: Optionally set a start date
setupSteps.body: Set the optional 'start_date' field to bound how far back data is pulled for streams that support incremental replication. Leave it empty to use the connector's default behavior.

sources.title: Opsgenie API Overview (base URLs / EU endpoint)
